use_cases: Adding satisfying visual feedback to CTAs and buttons on landing pages
Creating interactive portfolio or demo showcases
Enhancing gamification elements in web applications
Providing delightful micro-interactions in SaaS dashboards
Adding celebration effects to e-commerce purchase confirmations
ai_summary: A click-trigger particle burst effect component that generates 8 particles emanating outward from the click point with smooth CSS animation. Features dark/light mode support with a bordered container, hover shadow effects, and automatic particle cleanup after animation. Perfect for adding satisfying visual feedback to interactive elements.
